## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] Manually tested on macOS (or noted why not applicable)
- [ ] Docs / README updated if this affects user-facing behaviour
- [ ] No new dependencies added without justification in the description (or none added)
